title: EMMA Capnograph
content_markdown:
#### Indications

- Secondary capnography device for patients receiving BVM +/- advanced airway. 
**Note that use of a secondary EtCO2 device is mandatory in the setting of RSI.**

#### Procedure

- Insert two AAA batteries if required.

- Attach a single use airway adapter to the device (see **Figure 1**).

Figure 1

- Connect the EMMA to the breathing circuit as follows: 
- Mask → Zoll in line capnography → EMMA → corrugated tubing (prn) → MDI adaptor (prn) → Bacterial Filter → resuscitation bag (see **Figure 2**). 

- Press the power on button on the EMMA. EtCO2 value displays “0” and respiratory rate value flashes

- The EMMA will display EtCO2 in mm (0-99 mmHg). EtCO2 values are displayed after one breath and the averaged value is updated every breath (see **Figure 3**).

Figure 2

Figure 3

- The EMMA will switch off automatically if no breath is detected for 2 minutes and 15 seconds when the adapter is removed.
